review_content.Placements: College is very newly opened so the placements are ongoing in a good way and also looking for good placements. It's only been 2 years, and the college yet started.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has big building and fantastic infrastructure. It attracts the newly joining students and their parents. Hostel is available on campus. It has a playground and gym. Labs are very hi-tech and have very require equipment. Classrooms have windows and fans, and also projectors. College has 79 acres of land.
review_content.Faculty: The passing percentage is around 80 to 85%. Every year is okay here. The teaching faculty members are very reachable to the students, and the seminar like programs are conducted here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence &Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent campus and placements, but faculty support and teaching quality need improvement.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students got placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is around 5. 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. About 60% of students got internships in companies like Cognizant and Deloitte. The top role offered is developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good classrooms with projectors and well-experienced faculty members. The college provides Wi-Fi, excellent labs, and libraries. The college provides hostels. The hostel provides good food and comfortable accommodations. Sports and games are accessible for both day scholars and hostel residents.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence &Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college was very good with nice faculty.

review_content.Placements: As in our college, we are the first batch for engineering, so at present we are still in our 2nd year. So we are not completely aware of these placement things and packages. Still, our college has to wait for 2 more years to know about the placements and packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have every kind of facility, and the college campus is so good. We have proper labs and libraries, and we also have a digital library, and every book is provided in the library. Our college, however, is still in its early stages because we are the first batch.

description: Akash Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Akash Institute of Engineering and Technology Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 27598 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 22727 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Akash Institute of Engineering and Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 27598 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 14323, while in 2023, it was 43358.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

Akash Institute of Engineering and Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 163855 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 257788, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

Akash Institute of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 has been concluded for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech based on COMEDK UGET entrance exam scores, followed by the counselling rounds. Among the General All India category candidates, the lowest last round closing rank was 80238 for B.E. / B.Tech, making it the most competitive for admission in 2024.

college_info.college_name: Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The registration deadline for AP EAPCET 2026 (without a late fee) has been extended to Mar 17, 2026, for Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies admission to BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies was founded in 1998. It is a private institute and is located in Chittoor, Andhra Pradesh. Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by AICTE and offers courses in Full Time mode. Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies offers a total of 21 courses in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA and the total seat intake for the available courses is 1200. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 70,000 to 2,32,000 and the average median salary is around . Apart from this, the Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies is around INR 54000 - INR 232000.
faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies?

faqs.answer: A:    Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies is a good institution for MCA, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies are Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, VLSI Design, Power Engineering.
faqs.question: What specializations do Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies provides programmes including MCA, B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM in streams such as IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, VLSI Design, Power Engineering.

45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.

approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.

reviews_list.review_title: My college is very bad and placements are for at least 10 students not placed in campus placements.

review_content.Placements: Honestly my college is very bad and its management is not good. I think so many people have suffered this situation but cant do anything and placements have no placements. Students are paid so much money but no use. Please raise the information try to understand the students situations.
review_content.Infrastructure: My opinion is that my college classrooms are very bad at least in the engineering college. We can provide the projector and internet also not provided. The labs are not working well and the hostels are very bad. Students lack the amount paid but the facilities are very bad and the food is very bad. Please try to understand this problem not only to me but also to everyone suffering from this problem.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: My college and experience.

review_content.Placements: 60% of students are placed in our courses. The highest package offered is 8LPA, the lowest package offered is 4LPA, and the average package offered is 6LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Cognizant, Hexaware, and Deltax. 50% of students got internship in our course in respective interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. The facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and TV. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and quality. The medical facilities are also available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This is a good college with good infrastructure and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Students are taking Data Science and AI courses nowadays. Highest package of technology is 8 LPA. Lowest package is 4 LPA. Students are doing an internship certificate based on data Science and data analysis. Companies are Wipro, Amazon, Google, IBM, Microsoft, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and good infrastructure. Good course in college. Wi-Fi is 24/7. Library is also 24/7. Good classroom, labs are with good systems and AC. The hostel is good. Food is also good in canteen. It also has sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college with strong rules and quality education.

review_content.Placements: In this course, 75% of students get placed in our college. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. In the Data Science course, there are several roles, like data engineer, developer, and SQL developer. They provide internships at ACEIT.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The labs and classrooms are clean. In the hostel, the food is not good. The canteen is only available from 9 am to 6 pm.
review_content.Faculty: SITAMS is a good college with supportive and knowledgeable faculty who are always ready to help students. The college maintains discipline through strict rules implemented by the principal, ensuring a focused academic environment. Exams are conducted in a well-organized manner.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My journey at SITAMS by Mahesh Gondu.

review_content.Placements: In the last few years, almost 70% of students got placed in on-campus recruitment placement offers. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, etc. The average package is 3.90 LPA and the highest package is 9 LPA. Roles offered in my course are chip designer, developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies is good with well-equipped modern lab equipments and digitalized classrooms and digitalized library facilities available. Hostel is pleasant and good. Hostel fee is Rs. 60,000 per student including food and unlimited Wi-Fi connection availability. Sports facilities are good for students who are interested in sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Genuine review of my college.

review_content.Placements: Around 76% of students get placed in the campus selection. The highest salary package offered is 7.9 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3.7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Wipro and TCS. Around 90% of students are doing internships in ExcelR. IT languages play a major role in the company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is very beautiful. It is very nice. There is good maintenance in the college every day. We have good classrooms, libraries, and laboratories. The library has all books. The quality of the food is very nice in the mess and canteen. Sports are conducted by the management.

overview_faqs.question: Can Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies is a reputed institute for MCA, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 3.7 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4.1 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My college is very bad and placements are for at least 10 students not placed in campus placements.

content.Placements: Honestly my college is very bad and its management is not good. I think so many people have suffered this situation but cant do anything and placements have no placements. Students are paid so much money but no use. Please raise the information try to understand the students situations.
content.Infrastructure: My opinion is that my college classrooms are very bad at least in the engineering college. We can provide the projector and internet also not provided. The labs are not working well and the hostels are very bad. Students lack the amount paid but the facilities are very bad and the food is very bad. Please try to understand this problem not only to me but also to everyone suffering from this problem.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college and experience.

content.Placements: 60% of students are placed in our courses. The highest package offered is 8LPA, the lowest package offered is 4LPA, and the average package offered is 6LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Cognizant, Hexaware, and Deltax. 50% of students got internship in our course in respective interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. The facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and TV. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and quality. The medical facilities are also available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college with good infrastructure and good facilities.

content.Placements: Students are taking Data Science and AI courses nowadays. Highest package of technology is 8 LPA. Lowest package is 4 LPA. Students are doing an internship certificate based on data Science and data analysis. Companies are Wipro, Amazon, Google, IBM, Microsoft, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and good infrastructure. Good course in college. Wi-Fi is 24/7. Library is also 24/7. Good classroom, labs are with good systems and AC. The hostel is good. Food is also good in canteen. It also has sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Nice college with strong rules and quality education.

content.Placements: In this course, 75% of students get placed in our college. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. In the Data Science course, there are several roles, like data engineer, developer, and SQL developer. They provide internships at ACEIT.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The labs and classrooms are clean. In the hostel, the food is not good. The canteen is only available from 9 am to 6 pm.
content.Faculty: SITAMS is a good college with supportive and knowledgeable faculty who are always ready to help students. The college maintains discipline through strict rules implemented by the principal, ensuring a focused academic environment. Exams are conducted in a well-organized manner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My journey at SITAMS by Mahesh Gondu.

content.Placements: In the last few years, almost 70% of students got placed in on-campus recruitment placement offers. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, etc. The average package is 3.90 LPA and the highest package is 9 LPA. Roles offered in my course are chip designer, developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure at Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies is good with well-equipped modern lab equipments and digitalized classrooms and digitalized library facilities available. Hostel is pleasant and good. Hostel fee is Rs. 60,000 per student including food and unlimited Wi-Fi connection availability. Sports facilities are good for students who are interested in sports.

reviews.review_heading: My college and  experience.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided in our college are Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, canteen, CAD lab, and bookshop. The facilities in our hostel are Wi-Fi, washing machines, CCTV, food, and TV. The food in the canteen is nice, with reasonable prices and quality. reviews.review_heading: This is a good college with good infrastructure and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and good infrastructure. Good course in college. Wi-Fi is 24/7. Library is also 24/7. Good classroom, labs are with good systems and AC. The hostel is good. Food is also good in canteen. It also has sports.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with strong rules and quality education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The labs and classrooms are clean. In the hostel, the food is not good. The canteen is only available from 9 am to 6 pm.

reviews.review_heading: My journey at SITAMS by Mahesh Gondu.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies is good with well-equipped modern lab equipments and digitalized classrooms and digitalized library facilities available. Hostel is pleasant and good. Hostel fee is Rs. 60,000 per student including food and unlimited Wi-Fi connection availability. Sports facilities are good for students who are interested in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very beautiful. It is very nice. There is good maintenance in the college every day. We have good classrooms, libraries, and laboratories. The library has all books. The quality of the food is very nice in the mess and canteen. Sports are conducted by the management.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The course that I took was good but the faculty who were coming to the class were not so good; it was one of the worst colleges. It has no good labs. There was no good lab equipment. It was one of the worst colleges around. If you are thinking of joining this college, you are doomed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: There are two Wi-Fi routers, but there is no signal. Labs are better. The canteen is in poor condition. Qualification is not needed for faculty in the hostel. The food served in the mess is average, but it is limited.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. It has greenery. Computer labs are equipped with air-conditioners. Classrooms are digital.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. A huge library is available in our college. The hostel is good and well-maintained. Our college has good environment.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and students can take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good environment. The canteen is good and serves good food. The infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostels are good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, and facilities, but not satisfied .
reviews.review_text:
My college infrastructure is very good and peaceful, with greenery plants
All the laboratories and library facilities are available with good maintenance. Also the Wi-Fi, digital projectors are facilitated
The good quality of food and furniture is provided in the hostel
Also the 24 hours medical facilities is 
presented
The play ground is very big to play all the sports and games
The indoor stadium provided to play the games .

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but only at a few places. The labs are very decent and are provided with good systems and air conditioning. The classrooms are equipped with projectors and have good lighting. The library has many books, and we can take books with the help of a student ID.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sreenivasa Institute of Technology and Management Studies.
reviews.review_text: The students have all the facilities for games and sports. Adequate infrastructure is provided for indoor and outdoor games and extra-curricular activities. A canteen with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food is also available on the college campus. The college building has made more provisions for the expansion. Other facilities consist of a drawing hall, a conference hall, etc. RGIT provides a bus facility for students to commute from different parts of the city.

reviews.review_heading: This college has a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The library inside the campus was good with good infrastructure and facilities. Labs were better in computer courses. We recommend the good because it gives the best results with some knowledge. Hostels are good but the accommodation provided is average and up to the mark.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied enough to be a part of this college.

review_content.Placements: I got placed on my own. When it comes to the college, the placement cell of the college is working hard to get the students placed. The average ratio of students got placed in a year was 7:3, i.e., 70% of the students have already got placed and rest 30% are struggling for the same.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not much good as I expected to be, but no one cares for infrastructure if the faculty of the college is good enough to give you a better knowledge and let you know about the professional life. It is a Wi-Fi enabled campus with sports room and a separate library too.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with affordable fees, highly qualified faculty. It is one good MBA college.

review_content.Placements: Placement is good in the college. 65-70% of the students get placement from the college with an average package of 2.5 lakh. Internship is also good at the college. They provide internship to almost all the students with an average stipend of Rs. 4000. Many reputed companies like Tanishq, CoolG, Concore, Consegna, etc. visit the college for placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is also available in the college but sports and games facilities are not that good. The college does not have any playground for outdoor games. In the campus, students can only play pool and table tennis. No hostel is there in the college. Though the college has tie-ups with PGs nearby.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good MBA college in Gurgaon with average fees, good faculty and excellent placements.

content.Placements: Placements provided by our college were fantastic. All the students got placed in a well-reputed company. Even most of them got pre-placement offers during their internships. The salary packages offered were excellent. The average salary package offered was 5 LPA. The stipend offered ranged from Rs. 7,000 per month to Rs. 18,000 per month. Companies like Accrual, Path Kind Lab, Srijan Spectrum Pvt. Ltd., Sony India, Budweiser, Whirlpool, OYO, Ola Cabs, Hero MotoCorp and Mother Dairy, etc., visited the campus to offer final placements and internships.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Certification programme is good but not general MBA.

content.Placements: Placement percent of students is 50 percent. The lowest package - 2L, average package - 4L, the highest package - 6L is offered in my course. Recruiting companies for our course - Safeducate, snapdeal, etc. Approximately 60 percent students got internship from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by college are not too good and infrastructure is also fine. Wi-Fi connectivity is limited and very poor. There are no novels in the library. There is no hostel facilities given by the college. They help us to find PG at affordable price.

review_content.Placements: Placements training are good and coordinators done a very good job. Almost 100% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. It provides classrooms, laboratories, libraries, playgrounds, sports centers, hostel for boys and girls, training and placements cell, and well-versed Wi-Fi are maintained.
review_content.Faculty: In terms of academics, it is one of best institute in providing the academic clarity of the particular domain. The academics of this college also focuses on weak students who is not able to do task frequently. The quality of teaching is good, that every one in our class copped with a training and everyone get placed in some top notch companies. Our curriculum is also updated.

individual_reviews.title: It is a good and value-for-money college.

content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in campus interviews. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA. Companies visit the college to hire BE students. 10% of students got internships in companies like Tap Academy, QSpiders, and JSpiders. Roles like web development, technical fields, and non-technical fields are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: The library is available. It has neat classrooms. Labs are also available. The hostel is good and I am satisfied with the hostel. The canteen and sports are available on the campus. A bus facility is available. B.E, B.Tech, and various courses are available here.

individual_reviews.title: Review of OASYS Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Placements training are good and coordinators done a very good job. Almost 100% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3.25 LPA. The placements process is easy and very pleasant. It provides sure placements in end of semester.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. It provides classrooms, laboratories, libraries, playgrounds, sports centers, hostel for boys and girls, training and placements cell, and well-versed Wi-Fi are maintained.
content.Faculty: In terms of academics, it is one of best institute in providing the academic clarity of the particular domain. The academics of this college also focuses on weak students who is not able to do task frequently. individual_reviews.title: I got industry-based learning experience throughout the course.

content.Placements: In my college, almost 70% of students were placed. The average package offered is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies that come to our college are IBM, Oasis etc. There are internship opportunities within the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure and high-class facilities. Digital classrooms and library are available for students and faculty members. The hostel, medical and food facilities are excellent. They provide good quality food. Sports and games are average.

overview_faqs.question: Is General Shivdev Singh Diwan Gurbachan Singh Khalsa College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: General Shivdev Singh Diwan Gurbachan Singh Khalsa College is a renowned institution offering Certificate, After 10th Diploma, M.Sc, MBA/PGDM, M.Com, M.A, PGDCA, B.Sc, BCA, BBA, B.A, B.Com, B.Voc. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Beauty & Fitness, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Hospitality & Travel, Medicine & Health Sciences, Mass Communication & Media, Science, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. General Shivdev Singh Diwan Gurbachan Singh Khalsa College boasts an impressive review rating of 4.23 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4 for Campus Life, 3.57 for Placements, 4.57 for Faculty, and 4.57 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: General Shivdev Singh Diwan Gurbachan Singh Khalsa College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A good place to secure your future.

content.Placements: About 50% of students will be placed. They offer good range of salary packages for different streams with different qualifications. They help students to get a job in corporate and government sectors as well which are quite good and secure jobs, I think.
content.Infrastructure: We have great number of classes. Each department has its own computer lab and other labs. Each stream of books is available at library. Library has AC facility. There is a mess and canteen with a good sitting area and electricity supply also there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am completely satisfied with my college due to all the good quality services.

content.Placements: Students who pass with a minimum of 60% can get placements. The average package offered in my course is 2.75 LPA. Companies from Chandigarh, Amritsar, Jalandhar, Gurdaspur, etc., are the top recruiting companies for my course. Students with a minimum of 60% can get internships from my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities and infrastructure are available in my college. All facilities like free Wi-Fi connection, labs, library, etc., are available in my college. Good quality food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports, games, etc., are available in my college.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Leadership Development - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Khalsa college commerce block.

content.Placements: The highest package being offered by college placement is 10-15 lacs per annum and the lowest is 5 lacs. This college is linked up with nearby cities like Chandigarh, Kharar, Mohali, Ludhiana, and Rajpura for the placements and other cities too, but I know only these ones.
content.Infrastructure: The commerce block is well maintained and infrastructure is very attractive. This building has 5 floors, including a basement. Each floor has halls for meetings and presentations that are used by teachers for examining the students. Juice bar is also available to the college. The hostel facility is far away from the college for which college vans are provided, but hostels are not so good .

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Appropriate Review of KCP.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in my course. The highest was 240,000 and the lowest was 120,000. The average package was 180,000. MNCs and corporate sectors recruited students. 10% of students were placed for internships. Top roles vary due to the different job profiles offered in placements.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure like Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library were well maintained, and cleanliness was promoted. I did not opt for the hostel, but some of my colleagues and friends used to tell me that the the food quality and hostel mess were average, as per the price we were paying for it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Maths - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good and clean. Services are great. Staff behavior was excellent and helpful.

content.Placements: The college has a placement cell, but there are low chances of placement. You'll need to do an M.A. after completing your bachelor's for good placement. Teachers are very helpful in all matters; you can share any problem with them. The department is very cool.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a hostel for girls that is very good and clean. Food service is very hygienic. Rooms are clean. The environment is full of greenery. The hostel has a bus service for picking up and dropping off students at college on time. The hostel staff is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in comparison to other private colleges in Patiala.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided a Wi-Fi facility, but it was password protected. Labs were for expensive courses, and there was no availability of sports equipment for students other than sportspeople. There were no medical services or games. There was a mess for girls. There was no hostel for boys, and the canteen was overpriced.

reviews.review_heading: Khalsa college is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Khalsa College, Patiala is a famous college. Computer labs and all other subject labs, library, and Wi-Fi were available in the college. The college had smart classrooms. Hostel facilities were good. Hostel rooms were well maintained. The quality of the food served in the mess and canteen was also good. For sports and games, a ground and coaches were available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college had good teaching staff members, excellent infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college had an excellent infrastructure as there were different departments for different streams such as the commerce department, science department, arts and humanities department, and music department. Apart from this, there were other facilities like a canteen, juice bar, and for the commerce department, there was an elevator too.

reviews.review_heading: It is a fantastic college in Patiala region.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-fi enabled. There are many labs for every field of various courses like agriculture, physics, food processing and many other courses. Our hostel is the best hostel in Patiala, and it has the best mess for both the college and hostel. Canteens are the best juice points and cafe. Sports and games along with NCC and NSS are provided.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college because of its faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were the best. There were labs connected with wi-fi and updated systems. Sports meet was organised every year and in canteen food quality was best and taste so good. The department is very good and beautiful.

reviews.review_heading: The life of khalsa college Patiala.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is amendable also it is very nice and the ambiance of the college relaxes my mind but there is no jostel for college students who have come across from different states they have to take outer PG and rooms the Wi-Fi availability and the classrooms, library are very fine they are very quiet and are time to time reconstructed.

reviews.review_heading: To Be Honest Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is super it is both vintage look like and are department of Commerce and management is newly so they designed like a modern building yes in this in our college free Wi-Fi is available many Science labs and classrooms and librarian also a well maintained the hostel of a college is good it provides good quality of food which is reaching nutritions and vitamins and medical facilities are also given to students to take roll in sports.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for MBA students.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available such as canteen, computer laboratory, science laboratory, library, playground, etc. Hostel facilities were better. The food served in the hostel was decent. Electricity facility was average.

review_summary.college_name: Morigaon College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good to go to join this college.

content.Placements: Placement is very good. Every student gets good placements with well-reputed and renowned companies, and the curriculum is excellent. The college provides us with internships for a better future and experience. About 50% of students are placed in this course. The minimum salary package offered is 5 LPA, and it goes up to 10 LPA. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infotech, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra. About 80% of students got internships in this course, and they can join Wipro and Infosys. You can study B.A., B.Com, B.Sc., B.Voc, and B. Music.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is approximately 30%. The package offered by my course is a maximum 14 lacs per annum and the lowest is 4.8 lacs per annum. Some students have gotten internships from my course, approximately 30%. Chemists, petrochemicals, etc. are where the roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Minimum facilities are available in hostels, including a library and labs and they also have a great Wi-Fi connection. There have to be canteens and special medical facilities, just as in sports and games. There is an indoor and outdoor stadium on the college campus, as well as an auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. Our college is affiliated with GU. Our college got a B grade from NAAC.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides average facilities. They behave well with students. The food served in the canteen is average.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful. The teaching quality is good. The course curriculum makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are not much difficult. Exams are conducted strictly. The pass percentage is above average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Morigaon College is a good option for IT students and I recommend this college for everyone.

content.Placements: About 50% of students are placed in this course. A minimum salary package offered is 5 LPA and it goes up to 10 LPA. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infotech, Infosys, and Tech Mahindra. About 80% of students got internships in this course. They can join Wipro and Infosys. You can study B.A., B. Com, BCA, B.Sc., B.Voc, and B. Music.
content.Infrastructure: We have 3 washrooms in our department. We have Wi-Fi facilities in our college. We get 30 Mb of free data per day. We don't use Wi-Fi during the class. There is a network jamer (blocker) in our department. We have one computer lab and one library. We don't have any madical facilities in our college but we have very clean canteen in our college. We have two hostels, one for boys and the other for girls.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best forever.

content.Placements: About 70% of students studying in this course of mathematics in B.Sc. The highest salary offered in this course is approximately Rs.50000. It also has a government subsidy under the Assam government and the central government of India. Many companies offer various good quality jobs to complete this degree and also many good government jobs under this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our classroom quality is excellent in our college. The computer lab has a Wi-Fi connection to do programs in mathematics under mathlab. Our library is of good quality. All foreign general and many high profile books can be got in our library. We also have a hostel facility for girls and boys.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with less opportunities.

review_content.Placements: About 35% of the students in our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TVS, some local consultancy and BPO firm visited our campus for placements. The college has a tieup with some firms, so you will get an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has its own bus facility. The college provides facilities like well-equipped labs, good play ground and good classrooms. There is a canteen facility. A doctor is available on the campus for evening and morning slot. The college is near the city, so it is connected with local transport as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: All the things are present here which makes a college the better one. We enjoy our studies.

review_content.Placements: The college provides placements to students. In 2015, my seniors from CSE department got placed in good companies. They are working in different cities and are enjoying their jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. All the facilities are available in my college. The faculty are very good in subjects. All branches have very good labs and classrooms. The college organises a tech fest in both semesters, and all these fests were awesome.
review_content.Faculty: All the faculty are very good and have good knowledge about our branch. Their way of teaching is very good, we don't have any difficulties to learn something. The methods were very good, we easily get the point. All the faculty were very helpful in any type of project.

The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%. Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance(i.e. IITs/ IISc/NITs etc) duly recognized by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Rounding of marks or percentage is not permissible.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved Indian University or from a foreign University recognized by AIU or Institute recognized by the concerned University as equivalent thereto. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 45%. The Bachelor's degree must be of minimum three years duration after passing Higher Secondary (10+2) examination of (10+2) system or equivalent. overview_faqs.question: Is Infinity Management and Engineering College a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Infinity Management and Engineering College is a reputed institute for Certificate, B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Engineering, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Infinity Management and Engineering College has a review rating of 3.8 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.2 on campuslife, 3.2 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Infinity Management and Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Infinity management engineering college is very good for point of view faculty, placement etc.

content.Placements: The placement of my college is very good. The rate of placement is very high. Every year, 1000's of students are placed from my college, so you can go and take admission and start your journey, guys. The placement of my college is very good, and packages of my college are very high.
content.Infrastructure: As well as, hostel rooms are very clean and good, and the canteen is available in my hostel, so it is one more advantage for girls. Like, if someone wants to eat anything, the canteen is available. And medical facilities, sports teams, and games teams are available in my hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has excellent infrastructure and facilities with proper library management.

content.Placements: None of the students got placed till now when I am writing this review. There are no campus placements at all because the college management didn't invite on-campus recruitment. Even if the companies visit, then the job role offered is of a tele caller or customer care executive. But this year they are assuring that they are going to organise mega job fair.
content.Infrastructure: The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi connection. Systems in labs are with 2GB or 1 GB Ram. Classrooms are excellent, and the library is pretty awesome, but the books in the library are old. The hostel is available at cheap cost with every facility. The quality of the food served is manageable. No medical facilities are available in the college. There is only one event which is organised at the college called Hungama, but it is a good event, and students enjoy a lot.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with less opportunities.

content.Placements: About 35% of the students in our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TVS, some local consultancy and BPO firm visited our campus for placements. The college has a tieup with some firms, so you will get an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has its own bus facility. The college provides facilities like well-equipped labs, good play ground and good classrooms. There is a canteen facility. A doctor is available on the campus for evening and morning slot. The college is near the city, so it is connected with local transport as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: All the things are present here which makes a college the better one. We enjoy our studies.

content.Placements: The college provides placements to students. In 2015, my seniors from CSE department got placed in good companies. They are working in different cities and are enjoying their jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. All the facilities are available in my college. The faculty are very good in subjects. All branches have very good labs and classrooms. The college organises a tech fest in both semesters, and all these fests were awesome.
content.Faculty: All the faculty are very good and have good knowledge about our branch. Their way of teaching is very good, we don't have any difficulties to learn something. The methods were very good, we easily get the point. All the faculty were very helpful in any type of project.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Low cost and high knowledge.

content.Placements: The institution has a training & placement cell which is actively involved with the students and the faculty for arranging relevant training so that the students are oriented to make appropriate career choices and secure the best job for themselves. The institute has tie up with many industries and signed up MOUs with them. Till I got admission in this college more than 250 students placed in different industries, Such as HCL, Bharat Oman refineries ltd. Bina, DLF building India etc.
content.Infrastructure: The Infinity prides itself for it state of art and modern infrastructure. The college building is located on a 15 acre campus, which is a part of much biggest campus of 20acres, that include Nursing and Education college. Class room more than 30 airy and spacious class room for all four years for MBA with a seating capacity of 100 students in each class room and small clasd room for PG course class, 6 tutorial class room and 6 srminar hall are also there. College has 2 drawing hall 150 sq. MS. each with 90 drawing desk and drawing models. College has also two workshops located at 20,000 sq. Ft and computer lab, language lab, auditorium, common room etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent college with supportive faculty and great infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I am from the CSE AI & ML batch. In my course, currently placement drives are ongoing. Some are placed in a Real Page company internship programme. There are the highest and the lowest packages, which change from company to company. In my course, good packages are offered. Top recruiting companies in my course are Infosys, Accenture, Genpact, Real Page, etc. Some of the students got internships from different companies. Many top roles are offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has great infrastructure, and a CSE AI & ML course has many advantages. There are many facilities available for my department. We have free Wi-Fi on our campus, a full library, labs with good equipment, and spacious classrooms with projectors. Our college campus hostel also provides for girls with good food and security.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied, in a year. There is a good faculty and scope for good placement.

review_content.Placements: There are many people who are placed in my course, and it was an ongoing market course, so there are many options if we study well. We have companies like TCL and Tech Mahindra coming to interview us, and the highest package has varied from year to year. As I have seen, it was a 10 LPA package for a student over the past year.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for boys. We have to acquire a private hostel, but the environment in college and the surrounding area is insane. The college is absolutely worth it, and it has NCC. It also has Wi-Fi with a high range and quality, and the labs and lab faculty are good. There are 2 canteens, and both serve delicious food.

Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 30 LPA. The average package offered is 5 LPA. Many companies visit our college and select the maximum number of students from our college. Roles offered for students by the companies are manager or high-level professional.
content.Infrastructure: We get good facilities of Wi-Fi and a cafeteria. Labs are in good condition. All other facilities are good in our college. The infrastructure of the college is good.
content.Faculty: The pass percentage of our college, as per the branch sector, is 77 percent. The college is good at learning new technologies. Faculty members' teaching quality is good. Faculty members are good, and they have high standards.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College with good placements.

content.Placements: The college is one of the best engineering colleges in Warangal, and we have lots of placements this year. The students got placed into companies like HCL, Wipro, DeltaX, and so on. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The students have internships from the 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure. We have a free digital library which can be used by all the students to complete their work. We do have free Wi-Fi and also a good sports court. A canteen and mess are also available within the campus at affordable prices.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Excellent college with supportive faculty and great infrastructure.

content.Placements: I am from the CSE AI & ML batch. In my course, currently placement drives are ongoing. Some are placed in a Real Page company internship programme. There are the highest and the lowest packages, which change from company to company. In my course, good packages are offered. Top recruiting companies in my course are Infosys, Accenture, Genpact, Real Page, etc. Some of the students got internships from different companies. Many top roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: The college has great infrastructure, and a CSE AI & ML course has many advantages. There are many facilities available for my department. We have free Wi-Fi on our campus, a full library, labs with good equipment, and spacious classrooms with projectors. Our college campus hostel also provides for girls with good food and security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied, in a year. There is a good faculty and scope for good placement.

content.Placements: There are many people who are placed in my course, and it was an ongoing market course, so there are many options if we study well. We have companies like TCL and Tech Mahindra coming to interview us, and the highest package has varied from year to year. As I have seen, it was a 10 LPA package for a student over the past year.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel for boys. We have to acquire a private hostel, but the environment in college and the surrounding area is insane. The college is absolutely worth it, and it has NCC. It also has Wi-Fi with a high range and quality, and the labs and lab faculty are good. There are 2 canteens, and both serve delicious food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the best choices I have made to enter this college.

content.Placements: The students in my course placed are 23 members. The highest package offered is 9 LPA. The lowest package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiters are Google, Microsoft, and Intel. Top roles offered are manager post, head of the groups, and most ended up as just freshers.
content.Infrastructure: Vaagdevi Engineering College has the best infrastructure. It has 3 libraries which are super calm and peaceful to study. The speed of the Wi-Fi is unbelievable. Coming to the classrooms, they are super clean and comfortable. They are like the ones that are shown in the movies as top colleges.

admission_overview.college_name: Vaagdevi Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Vaagdevi Engineering College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Vaagdevi Engineering College considers scores in GATE, TS EAMCET, and TS PGECET for admission to specific courses.Vaagdevi Engineering Collegeoffers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,92,000 - 2,32,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 80,000 - 1,14,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

description: Vaagdevi Engineering College cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Vaagdevi Engineering College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 61116 and 71186 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialisations, use the provide

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 61116, 66490 and 70741, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Vaagdevi Engineering College. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Vaagdevi Engineering College MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 32009. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 35932, and the 2023 cutoff was 32091 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology are MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.4 by students. review_summary.college_name: Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: As I had completed my Diploma we had a lot of options and few companies to get placed. The college got opportunities from TCS, Foxconn, etc. The package is up to 5-6 LPA. The roles we get are as interns and freshers. Mostly 50% of students will be placed in the recruiting and others are willing to go for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. We have all the labs. The hostel facility is available for girls. The hostel is free of cost. The hostel facilities are good. There is a library. We can get any books we need. Overall it is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well qualified. They are very helpful. They will give you a quality education. The course the college offers is very relevant to the future they will be compulsorily placed in those sectors. There will be a bright future they will be ready for future job offers. Semester exams are not that tough. We have well-qualified staff who taught us everything and important questions that will be accurate the pass percentage will be 80%.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This is the worst college I have ever seen.

content.Placements: No placements are given by our college and there are also no such companies that come to our college and conduct interviews for placements. When we look at placements, this is the worst college and if you are interested in getting only a certificate, then you can join.
content.Infrastructure: There are no such facilities in our college; they won't teach computer basics, etc., for every branch except CSE and ECE. This is the worst college I have ever seen and when we come to faculty except mechanical and EEE faculty, the remaining faculty members are indescribable .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Choose the best college, before joining.

content.Placements: There was no placements in our college. Students may get placed, attending interviews off-campus. The highest package off-campus was 3LPA for CSE branch.
content.Infrastructure: There were many labs available. There was no Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms were not bad. Library was good. There was no hostel facility available in my college. Food was average in canteen. Sports and games activities were good in our college.
content.Faculty: Teaching quality was average. The faculties were not much helpful to the students. It was hard to prepare for the semester exams, because of self-preparation, without the help of faculties. The average pass percentage is 75.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements and I recommend students to join this college.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students got placed in our course. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. This college was very good in terms of placements. The minimum salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Many students got placed in 2022. This was the best college for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good. It also provided a huge library. All laboratories were well-equipped. Every department was very good in this college. The library was clean and several books were available. Wi-Fi was very good, and the speed was better. Canteen was also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: About 10% of students were placed. There were not many reputed companies, but they were worth working for. They conducted several drives, and we got a chance to build our careers even before finishing our graduation. That is a very good thing. Faculty tried their best to get us olaced.
content.Faculty: Teachers were well qualified and friendly with students. They were very helpful. They solved all the doubts. The teaching style was also good. They had good teaching skills. The pass percentage was around 70% in our college. The syllabus was completed on time.

cut_off.college_name: Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 48319 and 136758 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competit

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 48319, 64128 and 116627, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 40758. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 37369, and the 2023 cutoff was 37817 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. We have all the labs. The hostel facility is available for girls. The hostel is free of cost. The hostel facilities are good. There is a library. We can get any books we need. Overall it is good.

reviews.review_heading: This is the worst college I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: There are no such facilities in our college; they won't teach computer basics, etc., for every branch except CSE and ECE. This is the worst college I have ever seen and when we come to faculty except mechanical and EEE faculty, the remaining faculty members are indescribable .

reviews.review_heading: Choose the best college, before joining.
reviews.review_text: There were many labs available. There was no Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms were not bad. Library was good. There was no hostel facility available in my college. Food was average in canteen. Sports and games activities were good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and I recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. It also provided a huge library. All laboratories were well-equipped. Every department was very good in this college. The library was clean and several books were available. Wi-Fi was very good, and the speed was better. Canteen was also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: About 10% of students were placed. There were not many reputed companies, but they were worth working for. They conducted several drives, and we got a chance to build our careers even before finishing our graduation. That is a very good thing. Faculty tried their best to get us olaced.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good atmosphere, and it provides a memorable campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. Huge classrooms and a library were available. They are improving facilities like projectors, digital classrooms, computer labs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for studying, and it provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were excellent. Every classroom had a projector. Labs were excellent. The facilities in the hostel were good. The food was good, like the food in our home. Sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different types of departments. Our college provides good facilities. Our labs and classrooms are good and clean. Our library is full of books. Our college provides a canteen facility.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mother Theressa College.
reviews.review_text: We have all types of facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library with a good environment to study. There are cultural activities like sports and indoor and outdoor games. Our college has a canteen but has only limited types of food items.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its faculty members and campus crowd.
reviews.review_text: There are 9 computer laboratories with Wi-Fi facilities, and more than 10 hardware laboratories. Our college has a great library with 5000 books. It provides canteen with good snacks, tiffins, as well as lunch of good quality. Our management constructing a campus hostel, and it is in progress.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members and unnecessary fines.
reviews.review_text: There is a very poor infrastructure for labs. There is no anything in labs other than OA. The hostel environment is good, and the food served is average. Mobiles are not allowed inside the campus, and if students are caught with mobiles, then they have to pay fine.

reviews.review_heading: It was not up to the mark and needed more changes on campus.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi, and the classrooms were not up to the mark. For us, there was no hostel attached to the college, but later, campus hostels were provided for our sub-juniors. A canteen was available, and sports were encouraged during events like Independence Day, Republic Day, and fests such as the fresher's party and farewell party.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty and placements but you can enjoy your college life here.
reviews.review_text: In this college good library and classrooms are there with good infrastructure and availability of hostel which is located at the terrace of the college. Food in the mess is good. A canteen is there with delicious food as well. You can play sports like Cricket, there's a large ground at the back of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, feeling happy for making changes in college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a central library which contains a lot of books and compitative books to gain the knowledge. And our college has scheduled one class for every week for library hour. College is providing hostel for girls and has 2 canteens and a big play ground as well as Cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college, and it doesn't have good labs and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have good labs, and the labs are not comfortable. Teachers don't know anything, and they teach poorly. There are no hostel facilities in our college, and there is no mess. There was just a small canteen in which the prices of the food are high. The quality of the food is bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college environment is beautiful.

review_content.Placements: Above 78% of students got placed every year in our college. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, and Flipkart. Around 60% of students got internships. The top roles are Finance Manager and Marketing Manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms were air-conditioned and provided a healthy environment. We also have computer labs with a capacity of 50 members. The classrooms are neat. The library is very big. The canteen is also available. The college also conducts sports events every year.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.Hons.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The only thing I am dissatisfied with is placements which are not held due to COVID-19.

review_content.Placements: As I am a COVID-19 student. The placement at that time was frozen so no one in the college got placed anywhere. However, it provided industrial visits for students which helps students to grow their minds and think for the future, which I like the most.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are a lot of facilities like computer labs, a library, a restaurant, a canteen, an auditorium, etc. Classrooms are neat and clean. There is a lot of space. There is also a canteen and it serves good food. The college is full of greenery.

review_summary.college_name: Innocent Hearts Group of Institutions, Loharan Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My best journey started at my college.

content.Placements: MBA placements here are pretty decent. Most of the students who stay focused during the course manage to get placed especially if they have done internships or taken part in projects. The highest package goes up to around 10 Lacs per year though that usually for students who are really good and have work experience or strong communication skills. On average most people get somewhere between 4 to 6 LPA. The kinds of jobs offered depend on what specialization you take, like marketing, HR, or finance. Some common roles include business development, HR associate, marketing executive, analyst, and similar profiles.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied because of the good faculty and good placements in 2025.

content.Placements: My batch and my course are excellent. Some students are toppers in the college. In my college, students are placed with 75% or above. The highest courses available for students are hotel management and communication skill development.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college and my course is very good. Good classroom facilities are available for students. The canteen is very nice and hygienic. The quality of college students is mind-blowing. The food facilities available for students are good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college environment is beautiful.

content.Placements: Above 78% of students got placed every year in our college. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Google, Amazon, and Flipkart. Around 60% of students got internships. The top roles are Finance Manager and Marketing Manager.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms were air-conditioned and provided a healthy environment. We also have computer labs with a capacity of 50 members. The classrooms are neat. The library is very big. The canteen is also available. The college also conducts sports events every year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.Hons.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The only thing I am dissatisfied with is placements which are not held due to COVID-19.

content.Placements: As I am a COVID-19 student. The placement at that time was frozen so no one in the college got placed anywhere. However, it provided industrial visits for students which helps students to grow their minds and think for the future, which I like the most.
content.Infrastructure: There are a lot of facilities like computer labs, a library, a restaurant, a canteen, an auditorium, etc. Classrooms are neat and clean. There is a lot of space. There is also a canteen and it serves good food. The college is full of greenery.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Tourism and Travel Management - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best college in Jalandhar.

content.Placements: The previous placement was high and the average salary was Rs 9 LPA. As I am a member of the placement cell they are also too cooperative and they give special attention to those who didn't get placed. Too many internship programmes are also available.
content.Infrastructure: It is good and the canteen is superb. It is too big and has multiple entry gates so that a large cluster of students can also be handled and the campus is too neat and clean. Volleyball ground is also available. Very large grounds in which almost every game can be played.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Physics - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and nice faculty.

review_content.Placements: I studied for a normal graduation, so I didn't get any placement. However, a good number of students in other courses like MBA are placed. About 60% of the students get placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostels at this college are gender-separated, and all have Wi-Fi. Each science department has its own labs. There's a library for students and faculty, and a good canteen that serves a variety of food, snacks, and drinks. The college also has good sports facilities.
review_content.Faculty: The lectures were very helpful, and the professors were friendly and knowledgeable. Almost all of the students got a first division in every semester. The pass percentage was approximately 90%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc. Hons.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in the private college sector.

review_content.Placements: When I was studying at this college, there were no master’s courses available, such as MBA or MCA, so I did not receive any placements. I believe that in the future, placements will be offered by the college. No company is currently offering jobs, but I think it should develop in the next 2 to 3 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has many classrooms, and each department has labs available. There are usually sufficient practical projects for students to work on. Wi-Fi is also available in our college, and there are two smart classrooms. The canteen provides food that is very tasty.
